home.title: Practical guides on Google Shopping feed optimization
home.lead: Field-tested playbooks, deep dives and case studies to help your e-commerce store rank higher, convert better, and waste less ad spend.

newsletter.title: Get the weekly feed insights
newsletter.lead: Actionable Google Shopping optimization tips, every Tuesday. No spam.

footer.about: AI-powered Google Shopping feed optimization for stores that want fewer disapprovals, better CTR, and more revenue per click.

exitPopup.title: Before you go — find what's breaking your feed.
exitPopup.lead: Get an instant AI audit of every product in your Shopping feed. Titles, descriptions, GTIN, highlights — graded /100, with the exact rewrites to lift each score. Free, 30 seconds, no signup.
exitPopup.meta: Most stores find 40 % of products underperforming.

auditBanner.title: See exactly what's costing you Shopping clicks.
auditBanner.lead: In 30 seconds, our AI grades every product against 7 Google Shopping criteria — titles, descriptions, GTIN, highlights, and more. You walk away with a Feed Quality Score, the issues hurting your visibility, and the exact AI rewrites that fix them. Most stores find 40+ % of products silently underperforming.

auditPromo.title: Why aren't your products selling?
auditPromo.lead: Get a real answer in 30 seconds — every product scored, every issue named, every AI rewrite handed to you.
